changes.summary: Introduced BuildOS as the repository-level operating layer for future autonomous build runs.
Added Compliance Knowledge Engine rule registry, rule source tracking, jurisdiction resolver, rule evaluator, and UI provenance display.
Added Evidence Intelligence with evidence type inference, tagging, quality scoring, timeline summary, possible duplicate detection, and UI evidence quality display.
Added Image DNA Engine records, visual observation typing, image confidence scoring, image analysis helper, and active image module output.
Added Plan Review Engine with plan records, drawing type inference, missing-detail checks, plan review helper, and active engineering pathway output.
Added Assessment Intelligence with risk scoring, evidence completeness scoring, priority calculation, evidence-aware assessment creation, and UI score display.
Added Report Studio with report types, audience profiles, section builder, expanded report model, report generation, and report preview metadata.
Added Project Intelligence with status summaries, version history, search helper, audit trail, expanded project model, save enrichment, and project panel status display.
Added Agent Orchestration with agent registry, task-agent routing, auditable pipeline events, assessment integration, and UI pipeline display.
